name: Fruit Cheddar Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat the oven to 375°F.
2. Sift together the dry ingredients.
3. Cut in the butter until the mixture is pea-sized.
4. Add the cheese and toss lightly.
5. Add the eggs and blend well.
6. Chill one-quarter of the dough.
7. Press the remaining dough into an ungreased 15 1/2 x 10 1/2 x 1/2-inch jelly roll pan.
8. Spread half the dough with peach preserves and the other half with strawberry preserves.
9. Roll the chilled dough on a lightly floured surface to 1/4 inch thick.
10. Cut into 1/2-inch strips and place diagonally across the top of the preserves, forming a lattice pattern.
11. Press the ends against the side dough to seal.
12. Bake in the preheated oven for 35 minutes or until lightly browned.
13. Cool before cutting into 2 x 3-inch bars.
